description: Designing and implementing RESTful HTTP APIs, including endpoint design, authentication, request/response schemas, and documentation
example_requests: design a REST API for a task management application
build a CRUD API for user profiles
create an API for a product catalog with search and filtering
implement a REST API with JWT authentication
design an API for a social media feed

questions.question: What authentication method should the API use?
What HTTP methods need to be supported?
What is the response format?
options: JSON with a consistent envelope (data, error, meta)

questions.question: How should errors be structured?
options: Custom error object with code and message
I will define the error format

questions.question: Should rate limiting be included?
options: Yes — specify limits in the implementation
Yes — document it but implement externally (API gateway)

questions.question: Should an OpenAPI / Swagger specification be generated?
options: Yes — generate a full OpenAPI 3.x spec
Yes — inline code comments only (JSDoc / decorators)
